name: unplugged
description: A household data platform that manages schedules, meals, budgets, and presence scoring to promote screen-free family time.
author: HairlessJHarrison

tools.name: get_ai_context
tools.description: Get a complete household snapshot in a single call: config, members, today's schedule and free blocks, today's meals, budget summary, today's score, active presence session, and pending chores. Start here.

tools.name: get_today_schedule
tools.description: Get today's schedule events and free time blocks

tools.name: get_week_schedule
tools.description: Get this week's schedule events and free time blocks

tools.name: get_free_blocks
tools.description: Get available free time windows for the next N days

days.description: Number of days to look ahead

tools.name: create_schedule_event
tools.description: Create a new schedule event

tools.name: get_meal_plan
tools.description: Get the current week's meal plan with cost and health summaries

tools.name: create_meal_plan
tools.description: Add a meal to the meal plan

tools.name: get_grocery_list
tools.description: Get consolidated grocery list from meal plans

tools.name: get_budget_summary
tools.description: Get monthly budget vs actuals by category

tools.name: log_transaction
tools.description: Log a financial transaction

tools.name: get_spending_forecast
tools.description: Get projected spending for the rest of the month

tools.name: log_activity
tools.description: Log a scored family activity. Points are calculated server-side based on type, duration, and multipliers.

tools.name: get_today_score
tools.description: Get today's activities and total presence points

tools.name: get_score_trends
tools.description: Get weekly presence score trends

tools.name: get_streaks
tools.description: Get current active activity streaks

tools.name: start_unplugged_session
tools.description: Start a screen-free unplugged session for the family

tools.name: end_unplugged_session
tools.description: End the active unplugged session and auto-log scored activity

tools.name: get_presence_stats
tools.description: Get unplugged session statistics (total hours, avg duration, completion rate)

tools.name: get_household_config
tools.description: Get household configuration including members, dietary restrictions, and preferences

tools.name: update_household_config
tools.description: Update household configuration (e.g., set weekly reflection narrative)

tools.name: get_model_schemas
tools.description: Get JSON Schemas for all data models

tools.name: list_members
tools.description: List all household members with roles and colors

tools.name: create_member
tools.description: Add a new family member to the household

tools.name: update_member
tools.description: Update a member's profile (name, role, color, avatar)

tools.name: get_member_score
tools.description: Get a member's total score with breakdown by activities, goals, and chores

period.description: Score period: week, month, or all

tools.name: list_goals
tools.description: List personal goals, optionally filtered by member

tools.name: create_goal
tools.description: Create a new personal goal for a member

tools.name: update_goal
tools.description: Update a personal goal

tools.name: complete_goal
tools.description: Log a goal completion. Points calculated server-side with streak multipliers.

tools.name: get_goal_progress
tools.description: Get goal completion history and streaks for a member

days.description: Number of days to look back

tools.name: list_chores
tools.description: List all active household chores

tools.name: create_chore
tools.description: Create a new household chore

tools.name: complete_chore
tools.description: Log a chore completion for a member

tools.name: verify_chore
tools.description: Parent verifies a chore completion

tools.name: get_chore_status
tools.description: Get today's chore status per member with completion tracking

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today)

tools.name: get_google_auth_url
tools.description: Get Google OAuth2 authorization URL to connect a member's calendar

tools.name: google_calendar_callback
tools.description: Handle Google OAuth2 callback and store credentials

tools.name: sync_google_calendar
tools.description: Trigger a two-way sync between local schedule and a member's Google Calendar

tools.name: disconnect_google_calendar
tools.description: Disconnect a member's Google Calendar integration

tools.name: list_csv_mappings
tools.description: List saved CSV column mapping profiles for budget imports

tools.name: save_csv_mapping
tools.description: Save a new CSV column mapping profile

tools.name: get_member_schedule
tools.description: Get schedule events assigned to a specific member

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today)
